hooks.command: tmux set-option -gq "@agent_hook_state_${TMUX_PANE#%}" attention 2>/dev/null; tmux wait-for -S agent-sidebar-refresh 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set-option -gq "@agent_hook_state_${TMUX_PANE#%}" busy 2>/dev/null; tmux wait-for -S agent-sidebar-refresh 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set-option -gq "@agent_hook_state_${TMUX_PANE#%}" attention 2>/dev/null; tmux wait-for -S agent-sidebar-refresh 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set-option -gq "@agent_hook_state_${TMUX_PANE#%}" busy 2>/dev/null; tmux wait-for -S agent-sidebar-refresh 2>/dev/null || true
tmux set-option -gq "@agent_hook_state_${TMUX_PANE#%}" done 2>/dev/null; tmux wait-for -S agent-sidebar-refresh 2>/dev/null || true
